{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-64642", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "## Impact

Crafted requests targeting Next.js applications using App Router built with Turbopack and a **single** entry in `config.i18n.locales` can bypass middleware/proxy based authentication.

## Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade immediately, enforce authorization in the page's server-side data path instead of relying solely on middleware.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:59:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-64642"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:59:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vercel/next.js/security/advisories/GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/96014", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/commit/6bf4df14508ad6c0cd46af50c6051ee42f2d9151", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/releases/tag/v16.2.11", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/next.js/security-advisories/GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vercel/next.js", "summary": "Next.js: Middleware / Proxy bypass in App Router applications using Turbopack and single locale", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:59:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "16.2.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 16.0.0, < 16.2.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Next.js: Middleware / Proxy bypass in App Router applications using Turbopack and single locale
